---
title: "Add_feature_IDs"
output: html_document
date: "2025-01-29"
---

## Corrected or Uncorrected data
```{r}
input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels'
#input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels_CORRECTED/'
```

```{r}
library(openxlsx)
library(dplyr)
```

## Assay name
```{r}
sheet_name <- "Lipidomics, Untargeted"
```


## Read mixed models results

```{r}
split_string <- "_MixedModel"

xlsx_files <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names=T)

data_list <- list()

for (file in xlsx_files) {
  data_list[[file]] <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(file, sheet = sheet_name)
}
```


## Read feature metadata table
```{r}
lipidomics_IDs_pos <- read.delim('Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_metabolomics_lipidomics_LUMC/New information requested/Untargeted met+lip/20231123_134746_lipidomics_pos.txt', sep = '\t')
colnames(lipidomics_IDs_pos) <- lipidomics_IDs_pos[4,]
lipidomics_IDs_pos <- lipidomics_IDs_pos[c(5:nrow(lipidomics_IDs_pos)), c(1:33)]
lipidomics_IDs_pos$`Alignment ID` <- paste0('pos_', lipidomics_IDs_pos$`Alignment ID`)

lipidomics_IDs_neg <- read.delim('Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_metabolomics_lipidomics_LUMC/New information requested/Untargeted met+lip/20231123_135559_lipidomics_neg.txt', sep = '\t')
colnames(lipidomics_IDs_neg) <- lipidomics_IDs_neg[4,]
lipidomics_IDs_neg <- lipidomics_IDs_neg[c(5:nrow(lipidomics_IDs_neg)), c(1:33)]
lipidomics_IDs_neg$`Alignment ID` <- paste0('neg_', lipidomics_IDs_neg$`Alignment ID`)
```


## Add retention time and mass
```{r}
lipidomics <- data_list[[1]]

# Get retention times
features_RT <- lapply(lipidomics$feature, function(x) {
    if (grepl('pos', x)) {
      rt <- lipidomics_IDs_pos[lipidomics_IDs_pos$`Alignment ID` == x, "Average Rt(min)"]
    }
    else if (grepl('neg', x)) {
      rt <- lipidomics_IDs_neg[lipidomics_IDs_neg$`Alignment ID` == x, "Average Rt(min)"]
    }
    rt
})

## Get feature masses
features_Mass <- lapply(lipidomics$feature, function(x) {
    if (grepl('pos', x)) {
      rt <- lipidomics_IDs_pos[lipidomics_IDs_pos$`Alignment ID` == x, "Average Mz"]
    }
    else if (grepl('neg', x)) {
      rt <- lipidomics_IDs_neg[lipidomics_IDs_neg$`Alignment ID` == x, "Average Mz"]
    }
    rt
})

## Get Metabolite names if there
metabolite_names <- lapply(lipidomics$feature, function(x) {
    if (grepl('pos', x)) {
      metabolite_name <- lipidomics_IDs_pos[lipidomics_IDs_pos$`Alignment ID` == x, 'Metabolite name']
    }
    else if (grepl('neg', x)) {
      metabolite_name <- lipidomics_IDs_neg[lipidomics_IDs_neg$`Alignment ID` == x, 'Metabolite name']
    }
    metabolite_name
})

df_ids <- data.frame(Feature_Mass = as.character(features_Mass), 
                     Feature_RT = as.character(features_RT), 
                     Lipid_name = as.character(metabolite_names))

## Mapping table
lipidomics_mapping_table <- cbind(lipidomics, df_ids)
```


## Add feature metadata to Mixed Model results
```{r}
updated_list <- lapply(data_list, function(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(lipidomics_mapping_table %>% select(all_of(c("feature",
                                                           "Feature_Mass",
                                                           "Feature_RT",
                                                           "Lipid_name"))),
              by = "feature")
  return(df)
})
```


## Save to the Excel file
```{r}
lapply(names(updated_list), function(name_df) {
  df <- updated_list[[name_df]]
  wb <- loadWorkbook(name_df)
  writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, x = df, withFilter = F)
  saveWorkbook(wb, name_df, overwrite = T)
})
```
